# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the git diff and found changes only in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/run.json`. These are run metadata artifacts, not implementation code. No behavior-affecting code changes were introduced, so there are no correctness, safety, or robustness issues to amend in this patch set.

## Amendments

None.
